textByHash.072947b8ff638829ac1b9e26cba85c10cdac1f81: I didn't think so! Now go away. As I said, I'm very busy!
textByHash.2f683ac465b829e1254af9923de8d5ab7b519494: Let me see...you helped out a trader who in turn asked you to deliver something for him, and then you had to journey to some palace to see someone and they said thanks by sending you somewhere else.
textByHash.37bc4c19fee3e80af52251c99aca83242dc101fe: Of course it isn't, but you were the one who came here bothering me! So, unless you want something, be off with you!
textByHash.4286591acd8260f1c865d6361dc8ff4aafcae320: I see. Well then, let's see how you handle this!
textByHash.467afcb2e20bcf9f6c265e1b7d80534ff26525b6: So! You are a good mage! You deflected my spell.
textByHash.570d4789609b9d988b484eeb5ae51b9865772644: And what are you looking for exactly?
textByHash.5b0022c39629dfa8df9b5baff2953879a801ce4e: So, now you've ended up down here, bothering me?
textByHash.6316636b63064b850cd4d29ac7ab840453213036: You? Leader of the Dagon'hai? Hah! I've never heard of such rubbish! You call yourself a mage?
textByHash.6b40d8e3906794ac33d284e4f71ea9b26874f3f8: Hmph! Well I can tell you what you ARE doing.
textByHash.8300ad293597a99bf3468069aa2517189edc0f79: Wasting my time! Now go away! If you must speak to someone, speak to one of the other monks around here!
textByHash.8418ae72ae8c2b7d54ed8b3f45a52728a3f4c98d: That doesn't concern you. What are you doing here anyway?
textByHash.869d54da609a621d84cd70e17cf8dd31ee5cf399: Hah! I knew you were no mage! Let that be a lesson to you! Now, please leave.
textByHash.87876258b6fc1ee1573dd2ada20bff61ee3e5cdc: Can't you see that I'm busy here?
textByHash.9591cd1142c35219a8ff211bd25fe1e0d9c51b3f: Oh, it's you again. What are you doing here?
textByHash.aca4836c515cdf786262eae1e4f601109868048c: Hmph! Well, it's just a bit further down. Now, if you don't mind, I'm very busy here!
textByHash.fcf55b01f33a7113d2af3a9dd335153412697cd7: Don't look busy? I've got a lot of important work to do here.
